actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / higher-shell source-Higgs cross rows use the taste-radial second-source certificate, not canonical O_H
conditional_surface_status: conditional-support if future rows are rerun with a certified canonical O_H operator or a separate same-surface O_H/source-overlap bridge passes
exact_next_action: If the higher-shell chunks finish, checkpoint them as taste-radial C_sx/C_xx support unless a separate canonical O_H/source-overlap certificate lands.  Do not treat C_sH/C_HH schema fields emitted under the current certificate as strict source-Higgs rows.
open_imports: same-surface source-overlap or physical neutral-transfer bridge
strict production C_ss/C_sH/C_HH(tau) rows under canonical O_H authority

parent_statuses.campaign_status: open / active campaign continuing after current shortcut blocks
parent_statuses.full_positive_assembly: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.higher_shell_chunk001_pending: run-control / higher-shell Schur scalar-LSZ chunk001 active-pending checkpoint; no completed row JSON present
parent_statuses.higher_shell_chunk002_pending: run-control / higher-shell Schur scalar-LSZ chunk002 active-pending checkpoint; no completed row JSON present
parent_statuses.higher_shell_wave_launcher: run-control / higher-shell Schur scalar-LSZ wave launcher status; active or launched jobs are not physics evidence
parent_statuses.physical_euclidean_source_higgs_absence: exact negative boundary / tau-keyed production correlators are not physical Euclidean source-Higgs C_ss/C_sH/C_HH(tau) rows
parent_statuses.source_higgs_gram_purity_postprocessor: open / O_sp-Higgs Gram-purity postprocess awaiting production certificate
parent_statuses.source_higgs_pole_residue_extractor: open / source-Higgs pole-residue extractor awaiting valid production rows
parent_statuses.source_higgs_production_readiness: open / source-Higgs production launch blocked by missing O_H certificate
parent_statuses.two_source_taste_radial_action_certifica: exact-support / same-surface two-source taste-radial action source vertex realized; canonical O_H and production pole rows absent

proposal_allowed_reason: The active higher-shell source/operator cross-correlator commands use the PR230 taste-radial second-source certificate.  That certificate explicitly has canonical_higgs_operator_identity_passed=false, so rows under it are C_sx/C_xx support rather than strict C_sH/C_HH evidence.
